mapper.select:
FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE T
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM T_WORKFLOW_ACTION R WHERE R.ACTIONCLAZZCODE = T.PATH)
ORDER BY
T.ID DESC

SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT P.ID, P.PATH, P.RESOURCENAME, P.RESOURCEDESC, CONCAT(M.RESOURCENAME,'(',M.RESOURCEDESC,')') MODULE, CONCAT(C.RESOURCENAME,'(',C.RESOURCEDESC,')') CATEGORY, STUFF((SELECT ',' + MENU.MENUNAME FROM T_CORE_MENU MENU WHERE MENU.RESOURCEID = P.ID FOR XML PATH('')),1,1,'') MENU FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE P LEFT JOIN T_LCDP_RESOURCE M ON P.PARENTID = M.ID LEFT JOIN T_LCDP_RESOURCE C ON M.PARENTID = C.ID WHERE P.RESOURCECATEGORY = 'view' AND P.DELETEFLAG = '0' AND P.EFFECTVERSION > 0 ) T
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE BR where MENUID = #{menuId} and RESOURCEID = T.ID )
ORDER BY
T.ID DESC
SELECT DISTINCT PATH FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE WHERE RESOURCENAME = #{resourceName} AND RESOURCECATEGORY = 'java' AND DELETEFLAG = '0'
SELECT ID, PATH, RESOURCENAME, RESOURCEDESC, RESOURCECATEGORY FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE WHERE DELETEFLAG = '0' AND CONTENT LIKE '%${path}%' AND PATH != '${path}' ORDER BY PATH

SELECT
${columns}
*
FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE WHERE DELETEFLAG = '0' AND UPPER(RESOURCENAME) LIKE ('%' + #{resourceName} + '%')

SELECT R.ID, R.EFFECTVERSION, R.PATH FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE R WHERE R.RESOURCECATEGORY = 'java' AND R.DELETEFLAG = '0'
AND (R.EFFECTVERSION > 0 OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD C WHERE R.ID = C.RESOURCEID AND C.CHECKOUTUSERID = #{loginUser.id}))
ORDER BY R.PATH

SELECT R.ID, R.PARENTID FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE R WHERE R.RESOURCECATEGORY = 'module'
AND R.DELETEFLAG = '0'
AND R.CREATEDBYID = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT R.ID, R.PARENTID FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE R WHERE R.RESOURCECATEGORY = 'module'
AND R.DELETEFLAG = '0'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE SR WHERE SR.PARENTID = R.ID AND (SR.EFFECTVERSION > 0 OR SR.CREATEDBYID = #{userId}))

SELECT * FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE R WHERE R.RESOURCENAME LIKE '%${fromSuffix}' AND R.EFFECTVERSION > 0 AND R.DELETEFLAG = '0' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE TR WHERE TR.RESOURCENAME LIKE '%${toSuffix}' AND TR.PARENTID = R.PARENTID AND REPLACE(R.RESOURCENAME, '${fromSuffix}', '${toSuffix}') = TR.RESOURCENAME AND TR.DELETEFLAG = '0')

SELECT R.ID, R.RESOURCENAME, R.RESOURCEDESC, R.RESOURCECATEGORY, R.PARENTID, R.CATEGORYID, R.MODULEID, R.PATH, R.DELETEFLAG, R.EFFECTVERSION, R.CREATEDBYID, R.CHECKOUTUSERID, R.CHECKOUTTIME, U.USERNAME CHECKOUTUSERNAME FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE R, T_CORE_USER U WHERE R.CHECKOUTUSERID = U.ID AND R.RESOURCECATEGORY IN ('java', 'mapper', 'view', 'js') AND R.DELETEFLAG = '0'

SELECT H.ID, R.ID RESOURCEID, R.RESOURCENAME, R.RESOURCECATEGORY, R.PATH, H.VERSION FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY H, T_LCDP_RESOURCE R WHERE H.RESOURCEID = R.ID AND ((R.CHECKOUTUSERID = #{userId} AND H.SUBMITFLAG = 'no') OR ((R.CHECKOUTUSERID IS NULL OR R.CHECKOUTUSERID != #{userId}) AND H.EFFECTFLAG = 'yes')) AND H.DELETEFLAG = '0' AND H.RESOURCECATEGORY = 'java'
AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(MAX), H.CONTENT) LIKE ('%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND UPPER(CONVERT(VARCHAR(MAX), H.CONTENT)) LIKE ('%' + #{keyword} + '%')

SELECT H.ID, R.ID RESOURCEID, R.RESOURCENAME, R.RESOURCECATEGORY, R.PATH, H.VERSION FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY H, T_LCDP_RESOURCE R WHERE H.RESOURCEID = R.ID AND ((R.CHECKOUTUSERID = #{userId} AND H.SUBMITFLAG = 'no') OR ((R.CHECKOUTUSERID IS NULL OR R.CHECKOUTUSERID != #{userId}) AND H.EFFECTFLAG = 'yes')) AND H.DELETEFLAG = '0' AND (H.RESOURCECATEGORY = 'view' OR H.RESOURCECATEGORY = 'js')
AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(MAX), H.CONTENT) LIKE ('%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND UPPER(CONVERT(VARCHAR(MAX), H.CONTENT)) LIKE ('%' + #{keyword} + '%')

SELECT H.ID, R.ID RESOURCEID, R.RESOURCENAME, R.RESOURCECATEGORY, R.PATH, H.VERSION FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY H, T_LCDP_RESOURCE R WHERE H.RESOURCEID = R.ID AND ((R.CHECKOUTUSERID = #{userId} AND H.SUBMITFLAG = 'no') OR ((R.CHECKOUTUSERID IS NULL OR R.CHECKOUTUSERID != #{userId}) AND H.EFFECTFLAG = 'yes')) AND H.DELETEFLAG = '0' AND H.RESOURCECATEGORY = 'mapper'
AND H.RESOURCENAME LIKE '%${mapperSuffix}'
AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(MAX), H.CONTENT) LIKE ('%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND UPPER(CONVERT(VARCHAR(MAX), H.CONTENT)) LIKE ('%' + #{keyword} + '%')

SELECT C.ID, R.ID RESOURCEID, R.RESOURCENAME, 'comp' RESOURCECATEGORY, R.PATH, H.VERSION, C.CONFIG CONTENT FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY H, T_LCDP_RESOURCE R, T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP C WHERE H.RESOURCEID = R.ID AND ((R.CHECKOUTUSERID = #{userId} AND H.SUBMITFLAG = 'no') OR ((R.CHECKOUTUSERID IS NULL OR R.CHECKOUTUSERID != #{userId}) AND H.EFFECTFLAG = 'yes')) AND H.DELETEFLAG = '0' AND H.RESOURCECATEGORY = 'view' AND C.MODULEPAGEHISTORYID = H.ID
AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(MAX), C.CONFIG) LIKE ('%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND UPPER(CONVERT(VARCHAR(MAX), C.CONFIG)) LIKE ('%' + #{keyword} + '%')
SELECT ID, PARENTID FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE ORDER BY ID ASC
SELECT ID,EFFECTVERSION PARENTID FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE WHERE EFFECTVERSION > 0 AND DELETEFLAG = '0' ORDER BY ID ASC
